sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
வினைச்சொல் - பின்செல், பின்பற்று, பின்னே செய், பின்னே போ
1. to follow one who precedes, join him as his attendant, accompany him
2. to join one as a disciple, become or be his disciple; side with his party

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1 (as a particle of union) and κέλευθος keleuthos (a road); properly to be in the same way with, that is, to accompany (specifically as a disciple): - follow, reach.
